text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today, Yaeno Muteki and I are out shopping. The
streets around us are full of activity and
festooned in all kinds of bright and cheery colors.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The end of the year is upon us... I always seem to
forget until I see the town decorated.
choice_data_list:
You don't do anything special during the
holidays?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
By myself? Not particularly. Though I have gone
to parties thrown by the academy and my dorm in
the past.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I learned of the tradition of exchanging gifts at
the latter.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And what a fine tradition it is. As long as there
are people celebrating with you, then it doesn't
matter what gift you receive.
choice_data_list:
How did you usually spend the winter holidays
back home?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
We didn't do anything extravagant. We'd
decorate a tree and have roasted chicken for
dinner. Oh, we would eat cake too.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As for presents...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Did you know that only good children get
presents during this time?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: That's why Santa never came to visit me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Or more accurately, he would always come late.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: My stocking's empty... But I've been a good girl.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
For the past few days, perhaps. But what about
last week? And last month?

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: ...Urk.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry. Santa always has an eye on you, so
as long as you stay on your best behavior, I'm
sure he'll come by with your present.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
And so I'd focus on my training, and I really would
receive a present several days later.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was so satisfying to know Santa cared enough
to watch over me and would reward me with a gift
if I rectified my bad behavior.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Though now that I think of it, perhaps the
mere fact that Santa saw my efforts was enough
to fulfill my desire for attention.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If I could simply receive a present without doing
anything special, I probably wouldn't have even
thought to apply myself to my training.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But because I was initially judged as naughty, the
acknowledgement of redeeming myself was all
the more gratifying.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Grampa must have been aware of my true desire
ever since back then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt that the stipulations she had to
navigate in order to receive a present contributed
to her growth, but still...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I feel somewhat sorry for her, knowing that she
never got a present from Santa on time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there you are. So what is it you wanted my
help with?
choice_data_list: I want you to be Santa for Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki is such a hard worker, so I want her
to receive a proper present from Santa—and on
time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To enact the plan, I decide to ask Fuji Kiseki, the
leader of the Ritto dorm, for assistance. I proceed
to give her a rundown of the situation.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
...Ahh, what a splendid idea! I'd be more than
happy to be of assistance!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
To summarize, you'd like me to deliver a present
to Yaeno on the eve of the big day, correct?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
After all, one's stocking should already be filled
with Santa's presents by the time you wake up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Since I can't enter Ritto Dormitory myself, I have
to rely on somebody on the inside to do the
actual gift-giving for me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My only concern is how alert Yaeno Muteki is.
Thanks to her martial arts background, she's
constantly aware of her surroundings.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I warn Fuji Kiseki that, even fast asleep, Yaeno
might be able to sense her presence if she tries
sneaking into the room.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, don't you fret! I'll have you know I'm
proficient in sleight of hand.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure I can slip into her room while she's out
and make it so she won't find her present until the
morning of!
choice_data_list: Wow, you can really do that?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course! Consider it done! It'd be my pleasure
to take part in such a lovely surprise!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Then, on the fateful day...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Um... Thank you very much for the present.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
This gift here. You were the one who got this for
me, yes?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Oh! I assume you meant to surprise me by putting
it in my stocking.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, I happened to find it underneath
my bed after dinner last night...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
If only the pencil I dropped hadn't rolled under
my bed!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm so terribly sorry! It's all my fault that this act
of kindness from you and Fuji went to waste!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to be done since she found the
present on accident. I just feel bad for Fuji Kiseki,
who went through the trouble of helping.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Um, however... It made me very happy. To receive
a gift, of course...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But also knowing you went through so much
trouble for my sake.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Hehe. My apologies. I can't stop smiling...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although the surprise was a flop, I still managed
to put a smile on Yaeno Muteki's face!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Good morning, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Take a look at this! Santa graced me with a
present!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I found it when I woke up this morning!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was tucked snugly within my stocking. That can
only mean it came from Santa himself!
choice_data_list:
He must've visited you because you've been
good this year!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I knew it! Santa's identity remains a mystery to
me...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: But I'll put that aside for now.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Finally... Finally, I've been seen as a good child!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Aah! If only I could convey my joy and gratitude
to him!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But as much as I would like to, it'd be uncouth to
try and uncover his identity.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I wonder if Santa would receive a thank-you
letter if I put it in my stocking?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I'll give it a shot!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The surprise was a resounding success, leaving
Yaeno Muteki in great spirits!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several days later, with Fuji Kiseki's assistance
once again, I receive Yaeno Muteki's thank-you
letter.
